windows.label: Human Written

windows.text:
The report required by paragraph (1) shall be submitted in unclassified form but may include a classified annex. 
 
 (b) Deadline. Time periods. Briefings . Not later than one year after the submission of the report required by subsection (a), and annually thereafter until the date that is 5 years after the date of the enactment of this Act, the President shall brief the appropriate congressional committees on the matters covered by the report for the one-year period preceding the briefing. 
 (c) Interagency Coordination . The President shall ensure that any information collected pursuant to subsection (a) is shared among the Federal departments and agencies involved in investigations described in section 102(b) of the North Korea Sanctions and Policy Enhancement Act of 2016 ( 22 U.S.C. 9212(b) ).
